author: keshav08
content:
Hello everyone. I am Keshav. 

I am spending a lot of my time towards the consensus-spec and Grandine to better understand the repo. I have skimmed through consensus-spec before so reading through the Grandine implementation helps clear a lot of doubts. I am also reading through specs of EIP-8025: Optional execution proofs to understand its internals. Grateful to be a part of the cohort. More info on week 0 update: https://hackmd.io/@keshav0x/SJpIr3UWfl
